title: TokenDance — Collective KV Cache Sharing for Multi-Agent LLM Serving
summary_zh: 針對多 agent LLM 工作負載中同步 All-Gather 輪次的 KV cache 冗餘。利用同一輪次中 N 個 agent prompt 含有相同輸出區塊（但位置各異）的結構，以兩個關鍵機制攻克：KV Collector（整輪一次批次 RoPE + key-diff 分析，攤銷 N 次重複成本）與 Diff-Aware Storage（主副本 + 稀疏 Mirror 差分，達 11–17.5× 壓縮）。在 A100-80GB 的 Qwen2.5-7B/14B 上，並發 agent 數較 vLLM+prefix caching 提高 2.7×，prefill 較 per-request PIC 快 1.9×。
summary_en: Targets KV cache redundancy in synchronized All-Gather rounds of multi-agent LLM workloads. Exploits the fact that N agents in a round share identical output blocks at different positions using two mechanisms: KV Collector (one batched RoPE + key-diff analysis per round, amortizing N duplicate costs) and Diff-Aware Storage (one master + sparse Mirror diffs, reaching 11–17.5× compression). On A100-80GB with Qwen2.5-7B/14B, supports 2.7× more concurrent agents than vLLM+prefix caching and 1.9× faster prefill than per-request PIC.
